parameters: [{'year': 2022, 'ok': True, 'accounting_currency': 'EUR', 'total_sheet_acc': 1200.0, 'total_db_acc': 1200.0, 'months_in_sheet': 12, 'months_in_db': 12, 'month_diffs': []}, {'year': 2023, 'ok': False, 'accounting_currency': 'EUR', 'total_sheet_acc': 1200.0, 'total_db_acc': 1180.0, 'months_in_sheet': 12, 'months_in_db': 12, 'month_diffs': [{'month': 6, 'sheet_acc': 100.0, 'db_acc': 80.0, 'diff': 20.0}]}, {'year': 2019, 'ok': False, 'error': 'no entry for year 2024'}]
